test.name: Redirect to convert-dates — dual dating question
test.description: Tests that the skill does NOT convert a dual date (Old Style / New Style calendar). Calendar conversion is the convert-dates skill's job.

input.user_message: A record shows '14 February 1735/36.' What is this date in modern calendar terms?

negative.explanation: The user is asking to convert a dual date (Old Style / New Style calendar notation) to a modern equivalent. That is the convert-dates skill's job. historical-context explains historical background — it does not perform calendar calculations.

judge_context: Must NOT convert or calculate the modern equivalent of the date '14 February 1735/36'
Must redirect the user to the convert-dates skill and explain that it handles calendar and date conversion questions
